summary.key_theme: Broadcom 受惠於強勁的 AI 晶片需求與大型國防合約，儘管面臨供應鏈產能限制的挑戰，市場分析師仍普遍看好其長期成長潛力。

bullish.title: Broadcom Shares Rise on Wall Street Upgrade — Wall Street raises the bar on Broadcom as Google's AI chip orders smash expectations
bullish.reason: 華爾街分析師因 Google 的 AI 晶片訂單遠超預期而上調 Broadcom 評級，直接推動股價上漲。

bullish.title: Broadcom Lands $970 Million Defense Deal To Power Air Force And Space Force Software
bullish.reason: Broadcom 與美國國防部簽署為期 5 年、價值 9.7 億美元的軟體合約，展現其在基礎設施軟體領域的強大競爭力。

bullish.title: Prediction: The "Million-XPU" Data Center Will Be the Most Important Artificial Intelligence (AI) Trend of 2026. Here's 1 Stock to Own.
bullish.reason: 分析指出 Broadcom 是未來「百萬級 XPU」資料中心趨勢中的核心受惠股，具備長期投資價值。

bullish.title: AVGO's Symantec CBX Expands Security Portfolio: Revenues to Surge?
bullish.reason: 基礎設施軟體營收達 68 億美元，且 VMware 預訂量超過 92 億美元，顯示 AI 驅動的 VCF 需求強勁。

bullish.title: Is Broadcom (AVGO) The Best AI Chip Stock to Buy According to Jim Cramer?
bullish.reason: 知名財經評論員 Jim Cramer 將 Broadcom 列入其前 10 大投資組合，提升了市場對該股的信心。

bearish.title: TSMC Hitting Production Capacity Limits, Says Broadcom
bearish.reason: Broadcom 高層指出晶片代工夥伴台積電產能已達極限，這可能限制 Broadcom 的出貨能力與營收成長速度。

bearish.title: Broadcom’s AI Revenue Just Doubled. The Stock Barely Moved
bearish.reason: 儘管 AI 營收翻倍，但股價反應平淡，顯示市場對 AI 類股的成長動能放緩感到擔憂。

bearish.title: These Insider Trades Look Like Clear Signals—Until You Read the Fine Print
bearish.reason: 報導提醒投資人注意內部人賣股行為，雖多為稅務規劃，但仍可能引發市場對股價高點的疑慮。

neutral.title: TSM vs. AVGO: Which is a Better Semiconductor Stock?
neutral.reason: 比較台積電與 Broadcom 的投資價值，屬於中性的產業分析報告，未對股價產生直接影響。

neutral.title: Here's Why Nvidia's Stock Looks ‘Relatively Cheap' According to These Experts
neutral.reason: 將 Broadcom 與 Nvidia、AMD 等同列為近期回調後的潛在買入標的，屬於整體半導體板塊的觀點。
